EyeClick transforms any floor into an interactive learning environment - no screens, no devices, just pure physical play that develops motor skills, literacy and numeracy. Schools see measurable improvements in engagement and physical activity. It fits perfectly alongside your existing furniture, AV, or playground product lines.

Because EyeClick installations become focal points in gyms, media centers, and hallways, they naturally fit into the design conversations your team is already having with K-12 administrators. Systems range $5,000-$30,000+ and many schools find dedicated technology or wellness budgets to fund them.

Would it make sense to explore how EyeClick could enhance your K-12 product portfolio?

description: Designer, manufacturer, and installer of commercial indoor playground equipment for FECs and entertainment venues meeting international safety standards.
fit_reason: Strong fit as a commercial indoor playground equipment provider serving entertainment venues. They design, manufacture, and install solutions for FECs, indicating an established B2B sales operation. Their focus on premium, durable materials and international standards suggests they serve the same professional FEC operators that would value EyeClick's interactive solutions.
subject: Interactive tech that complements your playground installations
body:
I see Amusepolis has established itself as a quality provider of commercial indoor playground equipment with a focus on international safety standards and premium installations.

EyeClick adds a unique, high-margin interactive attraction that drives repeat visits and longer dwell time. FEC operators report 20-35% increase in repeat customers after installing EyeClick zones. With a typical ROI under 12 months, it's one of the strongest upsells you can offer your FEC and trampoline park clients.

Our interactive projection systems transform any floor or wall into an engaging play zone - completely complementary to your physical playground structures. Many playground equipment dealers have added EyeClick because it requires minimal installation, offers high margins, and creates recurring revenue opportunities.

Would you be interested in a brief conversation about adding interactive projection to your portfolio?

description: Provides audiovisual equipment sales, training, design, and installation for schools, universities, and educational institutions.
fit_reason: Educators AV is a specialized EdTech AV distributor with dedicated focus on K-12 schools and universities - exactly EyeClick's education vertical. They already sell interactive displays and AV equipment to schools, demonstrating established relationships with education decision-makers. Their service model (sales, training, design, installation) mirrors the gold examples' approach of providing complete solutions to educational facilities.
subject: Interactive floor solution for your K-12 AV portfolio
body:

EyeClick transforms any floor into an interactive learning environment - no screens, no devices, just pure physical play that develops motor skills, literacy and numeracy. description: Manufacturer and supplier of portable amusement rides and family coasters for carnivals and family entertainment centers.
fit_reason: Wisdom Rides specializes in building and supplying rides specifically for family entertainment centers and carnivals - direct end-customers for EyeClick. While they appear to be more manufacturing-focused, their sales to FECs and family entertainment venues aligns well with EyeClick's Entertainment vertical. They likely have a sales force calling on these facilities.
subject: Complement your FEC rides with interactive floor attractions
body:
Wisdom Rides' focus on family entertainment centers and family-friendly attractions aligns perfectly with a technology we think would complement your portfolio well.

EyeClick adds a unique, high-margin interactive attraction that drives repeat visits and longer dwell time. FEC operators report 20-35% increase in repeat customers after installing EyeClick zones. With a typical ROI under 12 months, it's one of the strongest upsells you can offer alongside your ride installations.

Our interactive projection systems transform floors and walls into game zones - no screens, no hand-held devices, just active physical play. Many ride suppliers find EyeClick helps them offer complete FEC solutions rather than just individual attractions.
